  1. Home
  2. Paper Products
  3. Business Cards

Business Cards

Customizable Business Cards

  • Product Overview

* Please note that if you are electing for professional design help with your business cards, we will charge a $60 an hour setup fee. *

Product Specs

Standard business cards are digitally printed on high-quality 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock paper and are available in either a glossy or matte coated finish.  

Artwork

Artwork Guidelines

Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps— with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Color Match Proof System

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your business cards. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

Production Times

Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

1 Business Day Priority:

Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option. 

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

2 Business Days Express:

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

5 Business Days Saver:

If you’re not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

Payment

All business cards must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog..

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order.

Shipping

General Shipping Guidelines

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the business card cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after initial scheduled delivery.

International shipping Notes:

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

Shipping Maps

Standard Business Cards

This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.

Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods for standard business cards:

Standard ( 3–5 Business Days )
Three Day ( 3 Business Days )
Two Day ( 2 Business Days )
Overnight ( 1 Business Day )
UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping

If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300 and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

* Please account for 1/8" bleed on all sides when designing your standard business cards. Finished size will be 2.00" x 3.50" *

Product Options
2.25" x 3.75"

For files larger than 60 MB please call for instructions to insure the fastest service.

    Add to Cart

    More About Standard Business Cards Return to Top

    Get custom business cards online without a hassle from Banners.com. Your business card should be as unique and professional as the business that you run. Make a great first impression on the people you meet by giving them a business card they won’t forget.

    Our professional business cards come in a standard size of 2” x 3.5” printed on durable paper, with a matte or gloss finishing option. The heavy-duty paper allows the cards to withstand the confinements of wallets, pockets, briefcases or purses.

    * Please note that if you select for professional design help with your business card design, we will charge a $60 per hour set up fee*

    Standard Business Card Templates
    Single Sided Business Card Templates Double Sided Business Card Templates
    AI  3.50"W x 2.0"H Single Sided Business Card Ai Template 3.50"W x 2.0"H Double Sided Business Card Ai Template
    EPS 3.50"W x 2.0"H Single Sided Business Card EPS Template 3.50"W x 2.0"H Double Sided Business Card EPS Template
    PDF 3.50"W x 2.0"H Single Sided Business Card PDF Template 3.50"W x 2.0"H Double Sided Business Card PDF Template

    Why Choose Banners.com for Standard Business Cards

    Your business card is more than just contact information—it’s a first impression. At Banners.com, we specialize in creating standard business cards that combine professional design with premium materials. Whether you need custom business cards for a personal touch or professional business cards to reflect your brand’s image, we ensure the final product exceeds your expectations.

    Pair your business cards with our custom printed paper products or custom postcards to create a cohesive brand experience.

     

    Unmatched Customer Service

    At Banners.com, we prioritize making the process of ordering standard business cards smooth, efficient, and stress-free. Customers like Cristina appreciate the quality of our service, sharing: "Quick knowledgeable customer service. Product was quickly produced and the process was easy to understand. Would definitely come back to order again."

    Here’s how we make your experience exceptional:

    • Live Design Support: Collaborate with our experts to craft the perfect professional business card design that reflects your unique style.
    • Free Proofing Services: Review and refine your card design with free digital proofs to ensure perfection.
    • Fast Turnaround & Shipping: Need your cards quickly? We offer fast production times to meet tight deadlines.
    • Dedicated Account Managers: From initial design to delivery, our account managers guide you every step of the way.
    • Satisfaction Guarantee: We stand by our products. If you’re not completely satisfied with your order, we’ll make it right.

     

    Frequently Asked Questions

     

    What is the standard business card size in the US?

    Our standard US business cards measure 2" × 3.5".

    What’s the difference between matte and gloss business cards?

    Matte has a smooth, non-shiny finish for a classic, premium look, while gloss is shiny and vibrant for extra color pop.

    How thick are your business cards?

    Our standard business cards are printed on 12.4 pt cover stock (thickness is measured in “points”—higher points mean thicker card stock).

    How do I design a business card?

    You can upload your finished design and we’ll print it, or start from a template in our design tools.

    What information should I include on a business card?

    Include your name, business name, phone number, email, and website, plus optional elements like a logo, job title, address, QR code, or tagline—using brand-consistent colors.

    Why Choose Banners.com?

    Customer Service

    Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

    Fast Turnaround

    Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

     

    Quality Products

    Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

    Live Order Tracking

    Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.
